creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
A new port for esecanna for VJE-Delta 3.0.

It pretends to be a cannaserver, which actually is a proxy server for
Canna clients to utilize VJE-Delta 3.0 engine.

How-To-Repeat: 
e.g.)
	make
	make install
	make package
	make deinstall
	pkg_add *.tgz
	make deinstall
	make reinstall
	make package

Tested on 3.4-STABLE and on 4.0-CURRENT.
